present_elements: light canvas background with thin border
one question-mark empty cell in the source

layout.empty or filled target cell: inside the middle grid area at a randomized row and column
layout.2x2 box separators: middle center, crossing the grid vertically and horizontally

sudoku4.teacher_change: The teacher render replaces the question mark with the unique green Sudoku digit.
sudoku4.style: flat 2D programmatic puzzle diagram with crisp grid lines

present_elements: light canvas background with thin border
rightmost question-mark result box in the source
arithmetic_chain.teacher_change: The teacher render fills the rightmost result box with the computed final value in green.
arithmetic_chain.style: flat 2D flowchart with rounded boxes and arrows

present_elements: light canvas background with thin border
one question-mark weight box in the source

layout.missing weight box: middle left or middle right depending on randomized side

balance_scale.teacher_change: The teacher render replaces the question mark with the numeric weight that makes both pan totals equal.

present_elements: light canvas background with thin border
row of four or five rounded slots
rightmost question-mark slot in the source
sequence_pattern.teacher_change: The teacher render fills the final slot with the number or shape that continues the visible pattern.

present_elements: light canvas background with thin border

layout.cardinal numerals: upper center, middle right, lower center, and middle left around the face

clock_arithmetic.teacher_change: The teacher render redraws the hands to the time after the requested whole-hour addition, with the minute hand preserved.
clock_arithmetic.style: flat 2D analog clock diagram with simple hands

present_elements: light canvas background with thin border
six labeled circular nodes A through F
graph_path.teacher_change: The teacher render highlights the unique shortest A-to-F path edges in green.
graph_path.style: flat 2D weighted graph diagram with labeled nodes and edges

present_elements: light canvas background with thin border
asymmetric flag-like object on the left
empty right side in the source

layout.mirror label: upper center just right of the mirror line

mirror_reflection.teacher_change: The teacher render adds a mirrored right-side copy whose flag points left toward the mirror line.
mirror_reflection.style: flat 2D geometry reflection diagram with solid colored shapes

present_elements: light canvas background with thin border
three vertical columns of colored square blocks
marked block with an X in the source

layout.block columns: middle left to middle right, sitting on lower ground line
layout.column labels: lower left to lower right below stacks
layout.marked block: within one randomized column, below at least one block

block_stack_view.teacher_change: The teacher render removes the marked block and shifts any blocks above it downward so no gap remains.
block_stack_view.style: flat 2D front-view block stack diagram with solid colors

present_elements: light canvas background with thin border
top switch that is open in the source
bottom bulb that is gray/off in the source
circuit_bulb.teacher_change: The teacher render closes the switch and changes the bulb to a lit yellow state.

present_elements: light canvas background with thin border

present_elements: light canvas background with thin border
three or four organism label boxes
one arrow pointing the wrong way in the source
food_chain.teacher_change: The teacher render flips only the wrong arrow so energy flows from food or prey to consumer.

one question-mark interior angle label in the source

layout.known angle labels: lower left and lower right inside the triangle

highlighted adjacent compared pair in the source

sorting_step.teacher_change: The teacher render swaps only the highlighted adjacent pair and leaves all other bars in place.

fraction caption asking for an exact shaded fraction
